title: Istio Architecture Overview
description:
## Istio Architecture Overview

Istio has two logical planes: the **control plane** and the **data plane**.

Which component acts as the **data plane** in an Istio service mesh?

options.text: istiod — manages traffic policies and distributes configuration
Envoy sidecar proxies injected alongside each application pod
Pilot — the legacy standalone traffic management component
Galley — validates and distributes Istio configuration

explanation: The data plane consists of Envoy sidecar proxies (istio-proxy containers) injected into every application pod. They intercept and control all inbound/outbound traffic. The control plane (istiod) configures these proxies via the xDS API. Pilot, Mixer, and Galley were legacy standalone components merged into istiod in Istio 1.5+.

hints.title: Data plane vs control plane
hints.body: The data plane handles actual packet forwarding (Envoy proxies). The control plane (istiod) programs the proxies with routing rules, certificates, and service discovery.
